options.name: <objectListOrCollection>
options.description: Leaf-instances, or hierarchical modules SDC-style wildcarding supported

options.name: -analysis_type
options.description: Specifies the analysis type for the query

options.name: -output_file
options.description: Specifies the output filename, Default: Display on screen.

options.name: -quiet
options.description: suppress warning messages for cells missing in CDB files

options.name: -view
options.description: Specifies the view names. Default: all views.
